featuredWork.title: Featured Work
featuredWork.subtitle: Real problems solved with measurable results

projects.title: E-Commerce Platform
projects.problem: Small businesses needed an affordable, scalable online store solution
projects.solution: Built a headless commerce platform with React and Node.js, integrating Stripe for payments
projects.outcome: Reduced operational costs by 40% and increased conversion rates by 25%

projects.title: Real-Time Analytics Dashboard
projects.problem: Marketing team required instant insights from multiple data sources
projects.solution: Developed a dashboard with live data visualization and automated reporting
projects.outcome: Decreased decision-making time from days to minutes, improved ROI tracking

projects.title: API Gateway & Microservices
projects.problem: Legacy monolith created deployment bottlenecks and scaling issues
projects.solution: Architected microservices architecture with centralized API gateway
projects.outcome: 99.9% uptime achieved, deployment frequency increased by 10x
